title: taraxacum tenuiprotractum
intro: Taraxacum tenuiprotractum, also known as the lesser dandelion or small-flowered dandelion, is a perennial plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged-edged leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and improve liver function. The health benefits of Taraxacum tenuiprotractum include reducing symptoms of indigestion and bloating, improving kidney function, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
